desc.ref: Avatar groups include tooltip text that corresponds to the colored borders, referencing the descriptive text written below.
desc.url: Avatars can be linked to a URL.
desc.icon: Avatars can also display icons instead of images or text.
desc.count: Avatar groups can be linked to a URL and include a circular border along with a total‑count indicator.
desc.group: Avatar groups are ideal for displaying multiple avatars together.'
desc.noImg: Avatars can be used without an image, in which case they display placeholder text.
desc.theme: Avatars without an image can use custom background colors or theme colors.'
desc.circle: Circular avatars come in multiple sizes and are typically used for profile images. The avatars animate when hovered with the mouse.
desc.groupTheme: Avatar groups can use custom background colors or theme colors.'
